description_long: This is a compact, tracked combat vehicle with a boxy, angular turret mounted atop a robust chassis. The vehicle features a prominent, forward-facing cannon integrated into the turret, which is reinforced with visible rivets and armored panels. The tracks are wide and rugged, supported by multiple road wheels and a drive sprocket, designed for traversing rough urban terrain. The rear section includes a grated engine cover, suggesting an internal combustion or diesel engine beneath. The exterior is finished in a weathered, pale green paint with subtle rust and wear, giving it a utilitarian, battle-worn appearance. No visible markings or insignia are present, and the vehicle is devoid of external accessories or secondary armaments.
description: A compact, tracked combat vehicle with a boxy turret, large cannon, and rugged tracks, finished in weathered pale green armor. The design is utilitarian and battle-worn, with no visible markings or secondary weapons.
description_view_0: Left side view showing the full length of the tracks, the angular turret, and the prominent cannon extending forward.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the large cannon barrel, the armored turret face, and the wide, sturdy tracks.
description_view_2: Right side view similar to the left, displaying the tracks, turret, and cannon, with the engine cover visible at the rear.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the grated engine cover, the back of the turret, and the width of the tracks.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large cannon mounted centrally on the turret; no other weapon mounts visible.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, riveted steel armor; turret and hull feature sloped and flat panels for increased protection.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid pale green paint with weathering and rust; no distinct camouflage pattern visible.
